acquisition method: Dataset Supporting Information S1 DDA LC–MS analysis of DHFR KD‐excel file
cleavage agent: A maximum of two missed cleavages was allowed during the search. Trypsin was set as the digestion enzyme for all samples.
collision energy: Fragmentation of precursor ions was carried out using higher energy collision‐induced dissociation (HCD) at 28%
fragmentation method: Fragmentation of precursor ions was carried out using higher energy collision‐induced dissociation (HCD)
instrument: hybrid linear Ion‐trap/Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: buffer containing 20 mM ammonia acetate, 0.1% ascorbic acid, 0.1% citric acid, and 100 mM DTT
reduction concentration: buffer containing 20 mM ammonia acetate, 0.1% ascorbic acid, 0.1% citric acid, and 100 mM DTT
